Operation 'get_conversations' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too vague and lack specificity. The description doesn't clarify what 'digital channels' means, what data is returned, or authentication requirements. Enhanced version specifies channel types, return structure, pagination support, and security requirements for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of conversations from digital messaging channels (SMS, email, chat, etc.) associated with the contact center. Returns conversation metadata including participants, timestamps, and message counts. Supports filtering and pagination for efficient data retrieval. Requires Contact Center Bearer Token authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too vague and lack specificity. The description doesn't clarify what 'digital channels' means, what data is returned, or authentication requirements. Enhanced version specifies channel types, return structure, pagination support, and security requirements for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'get_webhooks_failures' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about what failure information is returned, filtering capabilities, and use case context. Enhanced description specifies return fields, filtering options, and operational purpose for better AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of webhooks that failed to deliver successfully. Returns failure details including webhook ID, event type, failure reason, timestamp, and retry count. Supports filtering by date range, event type, and status. Useful for monitoring webhook delivery health and identifying integration issues. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about what failure information is returned, filtering capabilities, and use case context. Enhanced description specifies return fields, filtering options, and operational purpose for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'post_webhooks_retrigger' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear, but description is too minimal. Missing details about required inputs (webhook ID), what is returned (status, timestamp), and important side effects (retry count updates, status changes). Enhanced version provides complete operational context for AI agents to understand prerequisites and outcomes.

data.description_suggestion: Retriggers delivery of a previously failed webhook event. Accepts the webhook ID as input and attempts to resend the webhook payload to the configured endpoint. Returns the retry attempt status and new delivery timestamp. Side effects: Updates webhook retry count and delivery status in the system. Useful for recovering from transient delivery failures. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description is too minimal. Missing details about required inputs (webhook ID), what is returned (status, timestamp), and important side effects (retry count updates, status changes). Enhanced version provides complete operational context for AI agents to understand prerequisites and outcomes.

message: Operation 'post_click2call_start' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about the click-to-call workflow (agent phone rings first), required inputs, return values, and side effects. data.description_suggestion: Initiates an outbound click-to-call session from the authenticated agent to a specified phone number. Requires agent phone number and destination number as inputs. Returns a call session ID and connection status. The agent's phone will ring first, followed by the destination number upon agent answer. Active call is tracked in monitoring systems.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about the click-to-call workflow (agent phone rings first), required inputs, return values, and side effects. Enhanced version clarifies the two-stage dialing process and integration with monitoring systems for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'post_click2call_stop' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.description_suggestion: Terminates an active click-to-call session using the call session ID. Disconnects both the agent and destination party. Returns confirmation of call termination and final call duration. Updates call records and monitoring systems with end timestamp and call outcome.
data.reasoning: Added specificity about required input (session ID), what happens to both parties, return values, and side effects on call records and monitoring. This helps AI agents understand the complete lifecycle and impact of stopping a call.

data.description_suggestion: Schedules a future callback for a contact at a specified date and time. Requires contact phone number, callback time, and optional notes. Returns a callback ID and confirmation. The callback is queued in the contact center system and agents will be notified when the scheduled time arrives. Supports callback reminders and rescheduling.
